text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
What an excellent race! My heart is
aflutter!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
And now, with the race over, it's time for
the winning concert!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The winning concert is where fans and
the runners they support share in the
delight of victory.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Every racer strives to stand front and
center on stage, a spot reserved for the
first-place winner.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Some of the songs sung here can only be
performed after winning certain
important races or achieving other grand
accomplishments.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
So it's a very moving experience for
performers and audience alike.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
In addition, those who watch the concert
often go on to become fans of the
Umamusume who performed.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The winning concert is a key component
to an Umamusume's career!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Well then, let's go to the stage and see
their wonderful performance!
